description: Create a visual Gitflow diagram illustrating the release history of 'Project Phoenix' based on the event log at '~/Desktop/git_event_log.txt'. The diagram should be a horizontal swimlane layout in draw.io with five lanes: 'Main', 'Hotfix', 'Release', 'Develop', and 'Feature'. Represent the chronological flow of commits, merges, and tags (e.g., 'v1.0') as specified in the log. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/gitflow.drawio' and export it as '~/Desktop/gitflow.png'.
